entities.description: The research center in Niger where the trials took place

entities.name: NEMATICIDES
entities.description: Soil-applied chemicals used to control plant-parasitic nematodes

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Nutrients applied to the soil to investigate effects on groundnut growth and yield

entities.name: FARM YARD MANURE
entities.description: Organic fertilizer used to investigate effects on groundnut growth and yield

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The growth performance and spatial variability of the groundnut plants

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the groundnut crop

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight or amount of pods produced by the groundnut plant

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The weight or amount of the stems and leaves produced by the groundnut plant

entities.name: PLANT-PARASITIC NEMATODES
entities.description: Microscopic worms that cause stunted growth in groundnut plants

entities.name: SCUTELLONEMA CLATHRICAUDATUM
entities.description: A specific species of plant-parasitic nematode found in the rhizosphere and geocarposphere

entities.name: TELOTYLENCHUS INDICUS
entities.description: A specific species of plant-parasitic nematode found in the rhizosphere and geocarposphere

entities.name: XIPHINEMA PARASETARIAE
entities.description: A specific species of plant-parasitic nematode found in the rhizosphere and geocarposphere

entities.name: CARBOFURAN
entities.description: A specific nematicide used to reduce nematode population and increase yield

entities.name: DIBROMOCHLOROPROPANE
entities.description: A specific nematicide effective in reducing crop growth variation and increasing yield

entities.name: SOLARIZATION
entities.description: A soil treatment method using solar heat to affect crop growth and yield
